project_type: Full-stack app: Python FastAPI backend + Next.js 15 frontend
build_system: pnpm for frontend, pip for backend. No Makefile or brazil.
test_framework: pytest for backend (backend/tests/), jest for frontend (passWithNoTests)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm build in frontend to confirm TypeScript compiles. 2. Run pnpm lint in frontend.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Firestore client requires credentials for live testing but code can be validated structurally. Backend cannot be run without GCP/Firestore credentials.
contribution_requirements: Commit but do NOT push. Verify frontend builds.

key_patterns.backend_models: Pydantic BaseModel classes in backend/app/db/models.py with Field defaults
key_patterns.backend_repositories: Async class-based repos in backend/app/db/repositories.py using get_db() for Firestore. Pattern: classmethod async, collection stored as COLLECTION class var. Subcollections supported via db.collection('users').document(uid).collection('messages').
key_patterns.backend_api_routers: FastAPI APIRouter with prefix, tag. Auth via verify_google_token(). Query param auth_token or Authorization header pattern (see memory.py _extract_token).
key_patterns.frontend_hooks: Custom hooks in frontend/hooks/ with 'use' prefix. useChatSocket manages WebSocket + messages state.
key_patterns.frontend_api: REST helpers in frontend/lib/api.ts using getApiBase() for URL derivation.
key_patterns.websocket_handler: backend/app/main.py websocket_chat() - per-connection conversation_history list passed to orchestrator. conversation_history is mutated in-place by orchestrator (appends user + assistant messages).
key_patterns.conversation_history_format: List of {role: 'user'|'assistant', content: str} dicts used by orchestrator for Gemini context.

directory_structure: backend/app/ (FastAPI app), backend/app/db/ (models, repos, firestore), backend/app/api/ (route modules), backend/app/agents/ (AI agents), frontend/ (Next.js 15), frontend/hooks/ (React hooks), frontend/components/chat/ (chat UI), frontend/lib/ (utilities)
